subject: TONIGHT: Tune in to our debate coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
We may have a thing or two to say... | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=e2703fc3a6&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Friend -- The debate is tonight. And since Mike isn't taking donations, he won't be on stage. But we'll be watching and tweeting stuff. Fun stuff. The very best stuff. Some say it's the best stuff in the world. Join us on the Team Bloomberg 2020 Twitter account if you'd like to follow along. We'd love for you to be a part of the fun. [**Follow @Mike2020 to be part of the conversation tonight around the debate!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=9f0cac0deb&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=62373588dd&e=f54746ec54)
---
| Also, after the debate, Mike will join Stephen Colbert on "The Late Show" to talk more about his big ideas for America and how to defeat Trump -- you won't want to miss it! More soon, Team Bloomberg 2020

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Full steam ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Early voting in the primary begins in just over a month, and we are traveling to meet with Texans in coffee shops, community centers, and living rooms across the state.

|
---

MJ needs **18 supporters from your area** to pitch in before midnight and help her beat Sen. John Cornyn!

**[Donate now to be one of them>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489077a/7f51f7bc/4a8bbcd3/4ef019aa/2846244298/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200114.3nd__756__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
Hey Peter:

It may be early in the year, but our campaign is going full steam ahead! Early voting in the primary begins in _just over a month_ , and we are traveling to meet with Texans in coffee shops, community centers, and living rooms across the state.

But with 20 media markets, it's going to take a lot of resources to reach every undecided voter. **[Can you contribute to MJ's campaign today and help us talk to every undecided voter we can before the Texas primary on March 3rd?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489077a/7f51f7bc/4a8bbcd3/4ef019aa/2846244298/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200114.3nd__756__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

If just 18 people from your area become Official 2020 Members of Team MJ before midnight, we'll stay on track to build the campaign we need to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn. **[Will you rush a donation now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489077a/7f51f7bc/4a8bbcd3/4ef019aa/2846244298/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200114.3nd__756__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Finance Update via Bennet for America
subject: We've come too far to fail now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi Team,

Midnight Thursday, we'll be closing the books on our New Hampshire Investment Strategy push.

[The good news is we're over 80% of the way there - but we don't have much time to get across the finish line!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabd0/134673f2/8011238/69977107/1871490819/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabd0/134673f2/8011238/69977107/1871490819/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
[If we don't reach the $700,000 we need, we won't be able to keep our ads running or compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabd0/134673f2/8011238/69977107/1871490819/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know we've been emailing a lot recently, but hitting this goal is absolutely critical for us to compete in New Hampshire, and we've come too far to fail now!

[If you would rush your first contribution of $5 - or whatever you can afford - it would make a huge difference. Every dollar gets us that much closer to $700,000!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabd0/134673f2/8011238/69977107/1871490819/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm running for re-election to the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | I am going to keep working to make justice and opportunity real for everyone. Team, Running for president was one of the greatest honors of my life. I'll always be grateful that you were one of the people who stood with me as a supporter of our grassroots campaign. **Our presidential campaign is over, but the work to make justice and opportunity real for everyone must continue.** [**That 's why I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate this November. If you want me to return to the Senate for another term, please consider becoming a founding donor of my campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200114_CB_20200114-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've had the privilege of representing New Jersey in the Senate for over six years now. Even in the face of Donald Trump's hatred and division, I'm very proud of what we've accomplished over that time. At this critical moment in our history, I refuse to believe that real progress is impossible. **I know we can do big things together because we 've done them together.** I helped pass into law historic reforms that make our criminal justice system more fair. I have been a check on Trump while in the Senate and I will continue to do so when re-elected in 2020. And I helped create landmark incentives that draw new economic investment into communities across our state that need it most. [**I hope I 'll have your support as I seek another term in the Senate. Be one of the first to chip in today to help my re-election campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200114_CB_20200114-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") From taking on the NRA, to fighting for a fairer economy, to protecting and expanding health coverage for New Jerseyans, I won't stop bringing people together to take on the biggest challenges that are leaving so many people and communities behind. I'm eager to see what we'll be able to accomplish in the years to come -- but I need your help to get there. I hope you're as excited about this as I am, team. Let's go out and win this thing.

Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200114_CB_20200114-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc5/5fca0d19/7a832981/291d3e9e/391795293/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc5/5fca0d19/7a832981/291d3e9d/391795293/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc5/5fca0d19/7a832981/291d3e9c/391795293/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc5/5fca0d19/7a832981/291d3e9b/391795293/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The most important race happening in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $6,500 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The most important race happening in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $6,500 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **
**[Please, click here to give $5 or more to help Gary Peters keep Michigan blue, defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da96b/5721a3ed/70209a96/efb5351/2342618511/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNTAtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk250-fr-in-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: Unite the Country
subject: Will you join the conversation during tonight's #DemDebate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Tonight is the last presidential debate before the Iowa Caucus and we're ready to cheer Joe on! We know Joe Biden is the candidate with the best chance at defeating Donald Trump, the ability to unite the country, and restore stability to the Oval Office.
Our team here at Unite the Country will be live tweeting the best moments during tonight's #DemDebate -- and we need your help to ensure we reach as many voters as possible in the final weeks before the first votes are cast in Iowa.

[**Will you help us support Joe Biden tonight? Follow us on Twitter at @UniteCountryPAC, retweet our clips & quotes from the debate, and share your own thoughts about why you're supporting Joe using the hashtag #DemDebate.**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663a1/3437463974/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac")

During the previous debates, we shared videos, graphics and quotes of some of Joe's top moments, and we're excited to do it again.

Tonight, we'll be talking about how Joe is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and how Joe will be ready on day one to bring steady leadership back to the White House.

As a Senator, Joe led the charge on issues like fighting the NRA (he beat them twice!) and writing the first Violence Against Women Act. He was the chair of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee. Joe's experience and record of integrity prove he will always do the right thing and has the experience to get America back on track.

[**Tune in tonight at 9pm ET and join us on Twitter as we live tweet the #DemDebate!**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663a1/3437463974/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac")

See you on Twitter tonight,

Unite the Country

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663a2/3437463974/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663a3/3437463974/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663ac/3437463974/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663ad/3437463974/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ac/287b9173/2b05da47/7e7663ae/3437463974/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Evi Steyer
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey, Friend! I'm here at a watch party in Des Moines, Iowa, waiting to watch my dad take the debate stage tonight. The energy in the air is electric because this is the last debate before Iowans go caucus. This could be the last time folks hear from the candidates before they decide who to stand with. It's a big moment, and it makes me all the more grateful to be here in person. Thanks again to this entire team's hard work -- including yours! -- spreading my dad's message to voters across the country. You've shown your support for my dad and his message of real, people-powered change. Thank you for playing an important part in restoring hope in our country. [_**Will you help us go even further? Volunteer today.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVQJCYfD018owGI3n5YzGrSVkaGFt-2B2P2OeYWghMhDFKO6W2Z-2Fdq9-2BuqKU3I1ajDwMhQh190QDbcjbe8721AIB3lisCP3wM-2BB-2FCnYAlJ-2FyGagj-2FwbfnCwX630NYvXQwnZXYHjqR1U4Ak1D2GhXvnDqJganfXRC4x6b1l5RMi4OkSQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfUJUhl5JJtxmXNQYDF9X3RdxokdfLETt-2Ffl63K9D96RVeVzAcGunHDmOOjoXKeRAysIhyfx9cSTG7ZHvwNmyb3kP6o9Gjn2gxT3aBfeH8PyVLmxjoJWUNDE-2FFWAUdU1xOnnBzWBneWaSUH0umz6HJzR4Hpc21H3y-2FCYx2dBDktd4qovNokrY0D44Nf8FT7u-2FhxJmEyzBOHLQSxoUUVdPI1Gi7DSohK7sTF2jpKqotnYRqy32cDgWTd8E5vyyyoSFZJXeYph3xYwFYnQ9K7F7lFtxOpk6guctZfuQ7PMrbYOl-2Fuynn0dSxU8pKUR2I2fVcsWjpyAO8LJSBb2KP2ppNcBqnLmfcjiZYeX-2F9X9V9WDA-3D-3D) Alright, I'm going to go phonebank with our amazing TeamTom volunteers before the big night! **Be sure to watch CNN and cheer him on tonight at 8 p.m. Central Time/6 p.m. Pacific Time.** Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | Hey, Friend! I'm here at a watch party in Des Moines, Iowa, waiting to watch my dad take the debate stage tonight. The energy in the air is electric because this is the last debate before Iowans go caucus. This could be the last time folks hear from the candidates before they decide who to stand with. It's a big moment, and it makes me all the more grateful to be here in person. Thanks again to this entire team's hard work -- including yours! -- spreading my dad's message to voters across the country. You've shown your support for my dad and his message of real, people-powered change. Thank you for playing an important part in restoring hope in our country. Alright, I'm going to go phonebank with our amazing TeamTom volunteers before the big night! Be sure to watch CNN and cheer him on tonight at 8 p.m. Central Time/6 p.m. Pacific Time. Thank you, Evi Steyer | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! >
This debate is a big one -- with early voting starting this week, this is the last debate before the very first vote is cast in this race.

And here's the thing.

There are still plenty of people across the country who are tuning into this race for the very first time -- which means they're just now learning about this grassroots movement and Elizabeth's plans to put power in the hands of working people.

**While Elizabeth is on the debate stage sharing our vision for an America that works for working people, we need to keep up the fight here at home.**[**Chip in $2 right now and help give this grassroots movement a boost.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4b5/45c30650/1ec4a853e/66ffff26/2340601470/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU41NUZfREVCX0dSTV9UXzIwMjAwMTE0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN55F_DEB_GRM_T_20200114_V1S3_P")

body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b904fd/30fd46cd/3232c0c7/235798a7/4120425991/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2020.01.14_e2_td_quadcity_all&source=em_fr_2020.01.14_e2_td_quadcity_all") Friends, we're making the news!

One of the largest newspapers in Iowa just published an article about our campaign. Read below for an excerpt: |
---
"The results of the Iowa caucus are important not just for who wins but for who does better than people expect, because that sends a message," Delaney said. "At the end of this day, this isn't about me. If I do better in Iowa than expected, these ideas get life too."

"These ideas" include several Delaney has stumped on since announcing his campaign, in mid-2017: universal health care, although not Medicare-for-all; free trade, including support for the Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP) deal; a carbon tax; doubling the Earned Income Tax Credit nationally; an anti-isolationist foreign policy; and the idea that "innovation creates more jobs than it displaces."

"Everyone who says the world doesn't get better every year isn't looking at the facts," Delaney said, citing the worldwide reduction in poverty. "The facts favor the optimists."

And yet Delaney isn't quiet about the "crisis" he sees in small towns across Iowa, where his campaign is devoting its energy in the final weeks before the caucuses. "There's legitimately a lot of anger out there," Delaney said, "and I think the anger is based on a reality: the federal government hasn't solved a lot of these problems, and it should have a long time ago."

Delaney occupies a spot in the Democratic Party's centrist wing. On Monday he took shots at some of the left-leaning candidates, particularly Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders and Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren. He also panned some of the bolder policy proposals receiving national attention.

The universal basic income, a hallmark of entrepreneur Andrew Yang's campaign, is "the worst piece of legislation being talked about in this election," said Delaney, who favors "more progressive" safety net policies that differentiate between citizens in-need and citizens with means.

The first candidate to have visited all 99 Iowa counties, Delaney also distinguished himself from the two left-leaning senators from New England.

"The Republican Party wants to put up physical walls to keep immigrants out," Delaney said. "If you listen to Sanders and Warren and some of these other folks, they want to put up economic walls. There's no difference, really, at the end of the idea."

"I believe this notion that the private sector, the government sector and the nonprofit sector working well together is the best way we solve problems," he added. "This notion of vilifying different things is crazy. That's not how you make progress."

Delaney also defended his centrism as both a pragmatic and political strategy. The 2020 election, he said, will generate enthusiastic turnout among both Democrats and Republicans. As a result, the Democrats should court centrist and independent voters who will decide the race, he said.

"Should we be upset that the person who's leading the Iowa caucus right now is a socialist? Yeah, I think that's a huge problem," Delaney said. "I think socialism is a terrible idea. That's not who we are as a country.

"The genius of the United States of America is that we let the free market work its magic," he added. "But what we did historically is moderated it with strong programs, like good public schools and infrastructure, with worker's rights and with laws that protect consumers."

On Sunday afternoon Delaney spoke at the People's Caucus presidential forum, a three-hour event at Davenport North High School sponsored by a coalition of Midwestern social justice groups. Delaney was received warmly by the 500-person crowd.

"All this amazing stuff--technology and innovation and such--is actually enormously positive," Delaney told the Times editorial board. "We shouldn't villainize it. We actually have to embrace it and make sure we bend it to benefit more Americans."

Led by Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren, **their agenda is to take away our choice in healthcare, raise our taxes, and eliminate our jobs.** If they're successful, conservative voices will be silenced for years to come! Our country has come a long way since we elected President Trump in 2016. The economy is strong, opportunities are available for all, and we're once again leading on the world stage. But the Democrats are determined to reverse every last bit of our success. **In Congress, I will stand with President Trump to ensure they 're stopped dead in their tracks. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Here's what I know: the real danger that we face as Democrats is picking a candidate who can't pull our party together, or someone who takes big parts of the Democratic constituency for granted. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4c4/45c30650/1ec02da26/66ffe72b/393504159/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement. I hope I made you proud on the debate stage tonight.

One of the most important issues we talked about was how we'll beat Donald Trump. There's a question out there: Can a woman win? Let's tackle that question head on:

Collectively, the men on the debate stage tonight have lost ten elections. There were only two people on this stage tonight who have won every single election that they've been in -- and they were the women.

**Since Donald Trump was elected, women candidates have outperformed men candidates in competitive races. And in 2018, we took back the House and state houses across the country, because of women candidates and women voters.**

Here's what I know: the real danger that we face as Democrats is picking a candidate who can't pull our party together, or someone who takes big parts of the Democratic constituency for granted. We need a candidate who will excite all parts of the Democratic party, bring everyone in, and give everyone a Democrat to believe in. And I'm ready to do just that.

**Hope and courage win elections. That 's how I will make you proud, every single day, as this party's nominee -- and as the first woman president of the United States.**

**[We're building a grassroots movement together -- and together, we will win. clean_body: Here's what I know: the real danger that we face as Democrats is picking a candidate who can't pull our party together, or someone who takes big parts of the Democratic constituency for granted. | | | "" Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement. I hope I made you proud on the debate stage tonight. One of the most important issues we talked about was how we'll beat Donald Trump. There's a question out there: Can a woman win? Let's tackle that question head on: Collectively, the men on the debate stage tonight have lost ten elections. There were only two people on this stage tonight who have won every single election that they've been in -- and they were the women. Since Donald Trump was elected, women candidates have outperformed men candidates in competitive races. And in 2018, we took back the House and state houses across the country, because of women candidates and women voters. Here's what I know: the real danger that we face as Democrats is picking a candidate who can't pull our party together, or someone who takes big parts of the Democratic constituency for granted. We need a candidate who will excite all parts of the Democratic party, bring everyone in, and give everyone a Democrat to believe in. And I'm ready to do just that. Hope and courage win elections. That 's how I will make you proud, every single day, as this party's nominee -- and as the first woman president of the United States. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Tom Steyer
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
The energy tonight was something else, friend. This was my fourth time on the debate stage, but it was my first time as a frontrunner in the race. I'm still introducing myself to a lot of Americans, but it's clear that the rest of the candidates now recognize me as a serious contender. Thank you for helping propel us forward during this critical period. Every time the Democratic candidates get together to talk through the issues that our country faces, there's a noticeable shift in urgency. And rightly so -- Iowans will go to caucus in less than three weeks. **We _should_ be putting our plans through the ringer to make sure they're what the people want and deserve.** It's going to take a concentrated effort to defeat Donald Trump in November, but it's what we have to do if we're going to move forward toward a healthy future of climate justice, people-powered economic prosperity, and equity for all -- [_**if you 're ready to pitch in and help, sign up today to volunteer.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVQJCYfD018owGI3n5YzGrSVkaGFt-2B2P2OeYWghMhDFKO6W2Z-2Fdq9-2BuqKU3I1ajDwMhQh190QDbcjbe8721AIB3lisCP3wM-2BB-2FCnYAlJ-2FyGagj-2FwbfnCwX630NYvXQwnZUe69FuLTvdPRCOW-2F6-2F4QERphKtB8vbqGKLwiCKTd7sVw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdi9BxXRZjARUTFOMW4xt4-2B3DxGeSG-2BDQ0CLIrptOXmUgzGBzkQInJjiT4zZylHedYyRbW6EcnR6qUdFvTq-2BvnkW0TJpkHIFrDAUDWJs51qnoSB3T55XF8-2FzL7LIiO9rGQgq2IKxKsIjAx7lCUEnOKD7RypLE18AzWz-2Fc5deMlq3a6hEWDFspoMYCfdt9DRwMN9sosR2ObGJTalKsrLzw1mJXrhrknOkSozhK-2FvnYiMEhbI4mpbhxiZxkHY-2FCW6It-2FA79SM7QJ6TAxhbF-2BBfWGWZ-2FUHkbEXZjRPqPaZ9CrzIUlIcx0EI3U0Llm2ZedhZs6fxBMObNWh2hyFQn-2BVxBNrSaXAoQR0H8gzGMPjenbNiQ-3D-3D) I'm the only one in the race who can use my successful business background to call Trump out on his favorite topic to boast about: how "great" he is at business. Like a lot of what he says, his claims at economic success are a load of hot air. **He 's running our country just like one of his failed enterprises -- and whoever ends up in the Oval Office next year will have to undo the mess he placed us in. I'm ready.** Thank you for reading, for watching, and for being a part of this team.

--Tom

Every time the Democratic candidates get together to talk through the issues that our country faces, there's a noticeable shift in urgency. And rightly so -- Iowans will go to caucus in less than three weeks. We should be putting our plans through the ringer to make sure they're what the people want and deserve. It's going to take a concentrated effort to defeat Donald Trump in November, but it's what we have to do if we're going to move forward toward a healthy future of climate justice, people-powered economic prosperity, and equity for all -- I'm the only one in the race who can use my successful business background to call Trump out on his favorite topic to boast about: how "great" he is at business. Like a lot of what he says, his claims at economic success are a load of hot air. He 's running our country just like one of his failed enterprises -- and whoever ends up in the Oval Office next year will have to undo the mess he placed us in. I'm ready. Thank you for reading, for watching, and for being a part of this team. --Tom | | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . If you'd rather not receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking = — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA

subject: The Fight For Their Lives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:

---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | Friend, _For me, being pro-life is more than just a political statement_. It's more than just a policy point or an idea. **It's how I've lived my life**. As a single mother, who made the easy choice of life in a very difficult situation, I strongly believe in the America our Founders fought for — a nation founded on _**LIFE**_ and Liberty.
---
Watch Tina Share Her Powerful Pro-Life Message:
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhmljjk-udthdyhkil-i/)
**"**_**As Your Voice In Washington, I Promise I Will Always Defend The Right Of A Child To Enter This World Unharmed.**_**"** As a single mother, life's greatest blessing has been bringing a child into this world. My heart hurts to think of the millions of innocents lost to infanticide — and as your voice in Congress, you can count on me to fight with everything I have to end this barbaric practice. Since day one, the support for our campaign has been tremendous. It's humbling to see the number of Virginians joining Team Ramirez each and every day, and with your support, we will keep the momentum going! God Bless, Tina Ramirez
Candidate for Congress

Earlier this week our campaign shared with you that we are having a fundraiser in Ahwatukee, and we wanted to clarify that this fundraiser will be taking place on **Wednesday, January 22nd at 5:30pm, **and NOT on January 18th as previously advertised.

**We are excited to share that House Majority Leader, Representative Steny H. Hoyer will be joining us for this fundraiser!**

Majority Leader Hoyer is a national leader on LGBTQ issues, gun violence prevention, and growing economic opportunity in our country, who is excited to support Congressman Stanton in his re-election campaign.

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: David Perdue’s Abortion Tax
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13936451/145464878/-760261259?refcode=em011520-header&refcode2=668b7b14-c537-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhiN2IxNC1jNTM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Co42DB4mZYgIoE_zDpcHK6ea-s9rWrNEsHvagWy6bE=) **** | | David Perdue hates taxes on the wealthy and large corporations — but if you’re a woman looking to get an abortion, **he wants to penalize you by increasing your taxes.**

Perdue helped lead the effort to pass the Trump tax cut for the top 1% in 2017. He opposes taxes that stand to harm his own wealth or that of his campaign contributors, and he’ll blow a trillion-dollar hole in the deficit if the GOP’s top donors tell him to. But he sanctimoniously looks on a woman’s right – to her own bodily autonomy, to her own healthcare choices, to her constitutionally protected right to abortion – far more harshly.

This week he helped introduce a bill called the _Abortion Is Not Healthcare Act_ to make sure abortions can’t be covered as out-of-pocket medical expenses on federal tax returns – unlike private, intimate medical procedures performed on men. He basically wants to economically penalize women who make decisions about their own healthcare.

It’s absurd. And it shows Perdue’s hypocritical, vindictive views toward women and taxes. It’s dangerous to have a senator who is willing to use government as a weapon against its people.

**[David Perdue believes Amazon shouldn’t be taxed, but a woman’s uterus should. Rush in a donation right now to help defeat him and put the Senate’s anti-woman agenda on the scrap heap where it belongs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13936452/145464879/-760261259?refcode=em011520-b&noskip=true&refcode2=668b7b14-c537-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhiN2IxNC1jNTM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Co42DB4mZYgIoE_zDpcHK6ea-s9rWrNEsHvagWy6bE=)** | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | David Perdue hates taxes on the wealthy and large corporations — but if you’re a woman looking to get an abortion, he wants to penalize you by increasing your taxes. Perdue helped lead the effort to pass the Trump tax cut for the top 1% in 2017. He opposes taxes that stand to harm his own wealth or that of his campaign contributors, and he’ll blow a trillion-dollar hole in the deficit if the GOP’s top donors tell him to. But he sanctimoniously looks on a woman’s right – to her own bodily autonomy, to her own healthcare choices, to her constitutionally protected right to abortion – far more harshly. This week he helped introduce a bill called the Abortion Is Not Healthcare Act to make sure abortions can’t be covered as out-of-pocket medical expenses on federal tax returns – unlike private, intimate medical procedures performed on men. He basically wants to economically penalize women who make decisions about their own healthcare. It’s absurd. And it shows Perdue’s hypocritical, vindictive views toward women and taxes. It’s dangerous to have a senator who is willing to use government as a weapon against its people. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = —Team Tomlinson ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: madness
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=81A96A1A1188)
---
| | |
---
| | **FRIEND-**

---
| | **I’m doing everything I can to get the botched bail law that Governor Cuomo and the democrat-controlled state legislature passed in the middle of the night with the State Budget FIXED.**

In just two weeks we saw:

* An unlicensed illegal immigrant released with no bail after admitting to a hit and run that killed a young mother of three;
* A woman with a criminal history arrested for assaulting two Jewish women released and rearrested two more times in a week;
* A man with 24 prior arrests released without bail after being charged with assault for punching a police officer;
* A man accused of stabbing a woman to death in Albany back in July released under the new law;
* A man charged with predatory sex assault, rape of child less than 13 released without bail;
* A man arrested in connection to four Manhattan bank robberies released without bail and is suspected of robbing a 5th bank the next day in Brooklyn;
* A homeless man arrested for 2 unprovoked attacks on women was arrested again — just a few hours after his release;

And most shocking...

* On Sunday, a repeated drunk driver with 12 prior convictions, drove drunk again and killed a young medical student. He was released with no bail again after just being released on January 1 following an arrest for not having a court-ordered ignition interlock device in his car.

We must stop this madness.

Governor Cuomo and the state legislators, and those like Mayor de Blasio, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Rep. Max Rose who supported this while we tried to stop it, must ALL be held accountable.

Even worse, Democrat Presidential candidates like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Michael Bloomberg similar bail reform for federal crimes.

If we end up with a president and member of congress like Max Rose, what is happening with New York’s disastrous bail reform can happen nationally.

We must be vigilant about who we elect. Check out what I had to say on Tucker Carlson and Fox & Friends about this disastrous reform:
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=81A96A1A1189)
---
| | |
---
| | [Sign my petition, forward it to your friends, and let's put a stop to this madness.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=81A96A1A1187)
********
---
| | |
---

---
| | [ SIGN THE PETITION ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=81A96A1A1187)
---
| | |
---
| | **Together, we will win and stop this madness.

Sincerely,
Nicole**

name: Francis Conole
subject: [SURVEY]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
We want to hear from you, please take a look | [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | In these eventful times, it's sometimes hard to know what to focus on when so much is going on from the climate crisis to international instability, to rising drug prices, and more.

That's why, as 2020 begins, I wanted to take a moment to ask you what issues are most important to you and your family as we head into the most critical election year of our lives.

[**Click here to let me know what matters most to you!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/2020-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+let+me+know+what+matters+m&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1") [Take our survey](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/2020-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Take+our+survey&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1") We already know where Katko stands -- he has consistently placed the interests of Donald Trump above the national security, health, and success of Central New York families.

But to beat him, and his unlimited special interest money, we are running a campaign of and by the people. That's why your voice is so important to me as we move toward voting.

[**Click here to let me know your priorities ->**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/2020-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+let+me+know+your+prioritie&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1")

Yours in service,

Francis

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b394/388db0e9/826b885/609a7e93/873586372/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b394/388db0e9/826b885/609a7e92/873586372/VEsD/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b394/388db0e9/826b885/609a7e90/873586372/VEsB/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_180DO_200114_1_1")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

| | Hi Peter,

I wanted to send you a quick update this morning. I'm checking our fundraising numbers about every twenty minutes to make sure we're on track toward our mid-month goal at midnight. I just checked at 8:03 a.m. CT, and we've fallen off our pace!

We've got to get back on track, or we could actually miss our midnight goal -- which means we have to bring in an extra $6,004 before tonight. **[Can you make a donation right now to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890744/7f51f7bc/4a8def42/4ef019a5/379307739/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200115.1nd__760__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We'll send you a link to your printable official Team MJ membership card.

>
The latest polls are clear: This is a close race.

Every day between now and the first primaries and caucuses is a new opportunity to connect with an undecided voter and inspire them to join our movement for big, structural change.

Elizabeth is running to be the best president that money can't buy -- she doesn't take money from PACs or federal lobbyists, and she doesn't spend her time calling up big donors or giving special access to wealthy people in exchange for contributions to her campaign.

**So in the final weeks before the Iowa caucuses, she's relying on grassroots supporters like you to help fund our organizing and advertising efforts to connect with as many people as possible.**

**[If we can get our message out to as many people as possible before caucusing begins, we can win. But it starts with people like you chipping in to emails like this one. I endorsed Michael Bennet because he would be the best President of the United States. Period.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump retweets photoshopped anti-Muslim image of Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: Trump took to Twitter Monday to share a doctored image of Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer in traditional Islamic head coverings, meant to support his unfounded claim that Democrats support the Iranian regime and terrorists. For the millionth time, Trump conflated Muslims across the globe with terrorism \-- because he's a hateful bigot counting on the political support of hateful bigots. Despite everything, Trump's approval ratings have held steady around 42%. We need to know what engaged Democrats think about these developments so we can understand how likely Trump's re-election will be: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfcd/6e9863e8/17cfb6fa/1db042c3/1950186936/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dGjFlemd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfcd/6e9863e8/17cfb6fa/1db042c3/1950186936/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dGjFlemd") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfcd/6e9863e8/17cfb6fa/1db042c3/1950186936/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dGjFlemd")

Peter,
One of the most important priorities that I have set for my campaign is transparency. And part of that means being completely honest with you no matter what.
Democrats across the country are outraising Republicans by millions of dollars -- and they are doing it with their vast online network. Their goal? To put Chuck Schumer in charge of the Senate. And that means removing me from office.

| **Memo** To: Subscriber
From: Congressman Paul Gosar
Re: No Social Security for Illegal Aliens Act of 2020I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I have co-authored a new bill, the [No Social Security for Illegal Aliens Act of 2020](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAACghx3QE1cGdYTA-MgBmC7krG5c8AQAAAHBPiFaFrWwSlCatIn_xzLZpRwx6Hw0sgakOSL-9b9P3Ul7deaPNxrQTKWovK4Bk-U8Pm90E4EBQF1RKKDzNE4iHLjeHmtPWbMbmWtEgmwgPlAvRn3TETfKLzQaBW5bnatId0kPd_tIKaYJTTcUf9Yv9eoYh4PFD9ekMOFDjTx5N_PrO61QPHVAcBc8BUOBWJdVhE2ClCuN2Bx2XJY4o9kOqrP5GrZ_NKqwo9DlGDLSAVJ8eVXDfOcQq-MPjFt-JIukeM0k260ZCscFmlArqYnABYytKRc20Dq6xlVUmWvRqOJQv5Gi1bR8_zlPWbXXcHl_BH9crAs3X-R856snNZ6DQwjZAGa4GKFWezfl4iNVx), that would prohibit taxpayer funded Social Security benefits from going to those here illegally doing unauthorized work.The bill has already been endorsed by immigration reform group Numbers USA and I plan to push Speaker Pelosi and her leadership team to schedule a vote on the floor of the House of Representatives this year.I continue to be a strong voice for Arizona and getting our out-of-control border situation under control. If you support my efforts,****[**I’d ask for your support with a donation to our campaign**](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAOq6z3KTXabmXKpOzzo5PTYLK4e0AQAAAHBPiFaFrWwSlCatIn_xzLZpRwx6Hw0sgakOSL-9b9P3Ul7deaPNxrQTKWovK4Bk-U8Pm90E4EBQF1RKKDzNE4iHLjeHmtPWbMbmWtEgmwgPlAvRn3TETfKLzQaBW5bnatId0kPd_tIKaYJTTcUf9YspUCqG8LtxQX9gfRBY0bFC2zbXcgjq7hIsvQVqVBnv1MvFasGJ4jz1c7NzaTaHZlCFlXztoYW-Gq9m-DG82p9vFqP6Fr0ljIZdvFY9AeJNOXLqf2zUovp45nyuB11sWjiKgVlOm4EDis3jvndoC3QfoeW5CmLnVPiDOGIY0rJM4A) so that we can get our message out and rally Arizona conservatives for the 2020 election.Thank you for your continued support,
Paul
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Illegal Immigrant Crossings Fall 78% and Once Overcrowded Cells are Empty
body:
"There are a lot of statistics Mark A. Morgan, acting U.S. Customs and Border Protection commissioner, uses to show how Trump policies have helped..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f619b3727&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Illegal Immigrant Crossings Fall 78% and Once Overcrowded Cells are Empty**

“There are a lot of statistics Mark A. Morgan, acting U.S. Customs and Border Protection commissioner, uses to show how Trump policies have helped to cut illegal immigration into the United States”—but there are two that he thinks really make that accomplishment clear, Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

"First is daily apprehensions, a number that hit 4,600 at the height of the latest crisis in May. That has now dropped to 1,300. What’s more, he said, the 21-daily average is below 1,000, a 78% cut."

Second, detention facilities that once had _five times_ more illegal immigrants in custody than beds available are now well below capacity. That’s good news for American citizens, legal immigrants, victims of human smuggling, and our law enforcement officers.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d13d11169e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s delay in transmitting articles of impeachment against President Trump to the Senate was never going to result in what anti-Trump activists demanded. But it further eroded the credibility of the impeachment process by reinforcing the perception that it is nothing but partisan political theater,” Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=113347735e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The U.S. economy is the best it’s been in 50 years. But critics of the President have to find something to complain about, and their latest target is trade. Here’s the problem: As President Trump holds our trade partners accountable, “the economy remains robust, wages continue to rise, and inflation stays muted,” White House Director for Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7691a9da4a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump says the White House is committed to ending human trafficking, which she called ‘modern day slavery.’ President Donald Trump’s daughter and adviser made the comments during a trip to Atlanta on Tuesday. She visited nonprofit groups that help victims of human trafficking,” [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=177a90d07e&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| “Former President Barack Obama’s national security adviser fully supported President Trump’s decision to kill top Iranian Gen. Qassem Soleimani . . . ‘What the administration did in the Soleimani case is absolutely correct,’” Gen. James Jones said. Gen. Jones called it a “powerful step,” Caitlin Yilek reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35afb319fb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee7e08cf86&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7b49bac8e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=bc97e33cee)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Our veterans deserve a Congress that cares.
body:
Conservatives will deliver for our nation's veterans. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523905?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b11e818a85&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c8b8a54b30&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, Our veterans are rightly some of the most respected and cherished Americans in the entire country.

But often, our Congress fails to treat them with the respect they deserve. I promise to fight to change that when I'm elected to Congress.

Veterans deserve the ability to take their healthcare wherever they choose, they shouldn't be forced to use a failing VA system that gives them sub-standard care.

We also need to combat the horrific opioid crisis that has destroyed so many veteran families. Doing that will require securing our border against the narcoterrorists that have taken it over.

[**Democrats have made it very clear they have no interest in doing that.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=6ec0ffea7a&e=90fad69796)

Whether currently serving or enjoying civilian life after service, our military men and women deserve a government that treats them well. In Congress I promise to be a voice for them and the countless Iowans blessed to have a courageous veteran as a friend or family member.

[**If you think it's high time Congress finally treat veterans with the respect they deserve, please consider donating $5, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us get out message to voters and flip this district.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=886e9a3dc9&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0b24b73084&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and fight for Iowa's veterans. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=d7717ab31b&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Their desperation is growing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
With the first debate of the year under their belt, the Left is going to come out swinging and willing to raise whatever it takes to ensure President Trump never sees a second term.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE1NDg2MzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTQyNjM0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****

__The Democrats held their first debate of 2020 in Des Moines last night, 20 days out from the Iowa Caucuses, and, well...

You didn't miss much.

It was the same old song and dance, the same accusations against President Trump, the same radical ideas, the same costly plans...

Peter, the Democrats have had MONTHS of these debates and there is still no frontrunner, no consensus on who can challenge President Trump. Their proposals seem to get more radical and more progressive every day, and, with the ongoing impeachment sham, it's obvious their desperation to regain power is growing.

With the first debate of the year under their belt, **the Left is going to come out swinging and willing to raise whatever it takes to ensure President Trump never sees a second term.**

We can't let that happen, Peter.

_**It 's up to patriots like you to join millions of Americans across the country in uniting behind President Trump. This is OUR year, not the Democrats'.**_

Can I count on you to step up and make a contribution to help President Trump and me fight the Left?

[**CHIP IN $100**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE1NDg2MzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTQyNjM0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Seth Moulton
subject: I relaunched Serve America today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13944287/145543694/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTVjMGE0Yy1lNzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tLlYfXv0zK_bzQqcyPYc9hQdw1g8UhRwiNq5G8fvMs=&emci=536149fa-e137-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=8e5c0a4c-e737-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=194769) Friend, I'm thrilled to announce that today we have officially relaunched Serve America PAC with our first list of endorsements for the 2020 cycle! As you know, Serve America exists to help elect veterans and other service-driven leaders to the U.S. Congress and in state and local races across the country. In 2018, Democrats flipped 41 House seats from red to blue; 18 of those seats were flipped by candidates endorsed and supported by Serve America. This cycle, Serve America will be working hard to defend those gains and to support a new group of candidates who can help expand our majority in the House and be strong, principled leaders when they get to Washington. Check out our first endorsements of House and Senate candidates on our new website, here: **[https://www.serveamericapac.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13944288/145543695/-536114170?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTVjMGE0Yy1lNzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tLlYfXv0zK_bzQqcyPYc9hQdw1g8UhRwiNq5G8fvMs=&emci=536149fa-e137-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=8e5c0a4c-e737-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=194769)** These are strange and complicated times we’re living in. Donald Trump has turned the world upside down. He’s abandoned longstanding tenants of our foreign policy, ripped up trade agreements, pulled out of international accords, and poured fuel on the fire in the Middle East. And since his election, one of the only successful checks on his presidency has been our Democratic House--led by the veterans and next generation leaders we helped elect in 2018. **Here’s the bottom line: We need more new service-driven leaders in Congress.** In this complicated and dangerous world, our leaders need to understand the nuances of foreign policy. From Hong Kong to Venezuela, to Afghanistan, Syria, and Iran--the world needs leadership from the United States. And that means we need public servants who can step up and assume that mantle of leadership that Donald Trump has abandoned over the last few years. I’m committed to that work because I know how important it is, and I know how much we can accomplish together--because we did in 2018. If you look at what happened in the Virginia and Kentucky elections just a few months ago, you can see the power of committed, energized Democrats who are ready to get out and work to fix the mess we’re in. **This election, we can make a huge impact on if we work together.** So I hope you’ll stand with me today as we relaunch Serve America PAC and set our sights on 2020. We’ve been organizing and planning over the last several months and we’re now ready to hit the ground running. I hope you’re ready to join us today. Seth name: Tim Ryan
subject: The Republican cover-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
We should all be very concerned by what's happening in the Senate | | Team, Before the holidays, the House concluded its investigation into Donald Trump's serious abuses of power. Despite the adminstration's best attempts to obstruct the inquiry -- including blocking key witnesses from testifying and withholding important documents -- the evidence we turned up was crystal clear: **The president withheld almost $400 million in government aid in order to pressure Ukraine to help him win the American election.** His illegal actions threatened our free and fair elections, our national security, and our democracy itself. The House was left with only one choice under the Constitution: to vote for impeachment. The Constitution now calls for "impartial justice" to be done in a Senate trial. In every impeachment proceeding in history (and in every court of law in America), this means hearing from witnesses and examining supporting documents. **Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are planning something very different.** McConnell has bragged publicly that he's "not an impartial juror," and is "coordinating with White House council" to rig the trial for Trump. GOP Senator Lindsey Graham promised to "do everything he can to make it die quickly," and admitted he's "not trying to pretend to be a fair juror here." And despite important new evidence and the opportunity to hear John Bolton's testimony for the first time, **McConnell may not call any witnesses or admit new documents.** This issue must be bigger than partisan politics. **Can you call your Senators and urge them to support a fair trial? Just call 202-224-3121 and ask to be connected to your Senator.** A trial without witnesses would be a sham, and a tragedy for American democracy. We need every American to speak up now and demand a fair trial. \-- Tim | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff3/2511005173/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200114_trial&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+CONTRIBUTE+&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup")
---
** **
** **

* * *
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff2/2511005173/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff5/2511005173/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff4/2511005173/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff7/2511005173/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a4f/5486deaa/3e255d6d/dcbaff6/2511005173/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200113_coverup&source=200113_coverup") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

I hope I can count on == to make this vision a reality. | Thank you and God bless, | | Genevieve | | | == == == | | | == | | | Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc. | | Collins for Texas, Inc. | 6119A Greenville Ave., Ste 423, Dallas, TX 75206 | | Sent by mailto:info@gcforcongress.com

we wanted to make sure you saw this note below that Elizabeth sent after the debate last night. Since the 2016 election, women have been fighting back for a more inclusive, more hopeful, and more dem | | |
---
We wanted to make sure you saw this note below that Elizabeth sent after the debate last night.

Since the 2016 election, women have been fighting back for a more inclusive, more hopeful, and more democratic country. They've run for office in record numbers, and they've won. **That's how Democrats will win this election: by nominating a candidate who unites our party and who isn't afraid to fight.**

Elizabeth is building a grassroots movement of people across the country who are sick and tired of a government working great for billionaires and corporations, but not for everyone else. If you're sick and tired too, Elizabeth needs your help.

**[Click here and chip in $2 right now to support Elizabeth's campaign and help hit this goal before midnight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4f6/45c30650/1edc06d02/66ffe939/3814077634/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU42NkZfREVCX0tJQ19RXzIwMjAwMTE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN66F_DEB_KIC_Q_20200115_V1S1_P")**

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Tue, Jan 14, 2020
Subject: Thank you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
One of the most important issues we talked about was how we'll beat Donald Trump. There's a question out there: Can a woman win? Let's tackle that question head on:

Collectively, the men on the debate stage tonight have lost ten elections. There were only two people on this stage tonight who have won every single election that they've been in -- and they were the women.

**Since Donald Trump was elected, women candidates have outperformed men candidates in competitive races. And in 2018, we took back the House and state houses across the country, because of women candidates and women voters.**

Here's what I know: the real danger that we face as Democrats is picking a candidate who can't pull our party together, or someone who takes big parts of the Democratic constituency for granted. We need a candidate who will excite all parts of the Democratic party, bring everyone in, and give everyone a Democrat to believe in. And I'm ready to do just that.

**Hope and courage win elections. That 's how I will make you proud, every single day, as this party's nominee -- and as the first woman president of the United States.**

**[We're building a grassroots movement together -- and together, we will win. Can you chip in tonight and help power this campaign forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4f6/45c30650/1edc06d02/66ffe939/3814077634/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU42NkZfREVCX0tJQ19RXzIwMjAwMTE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN66F_DEB_KIC_Q_20200115_V1S1_P")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's ace up his sleeve? The Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Donald Trump did not win the real 2016 election. He lost the popular vote by nearly 3 million votes \-- and yet, he's still the president, thanks to the Electoral College. This system of electing the president is a remnant of a bygone era when wealthy landowners didn't trust voters and wanted to preserve power for themselves. We must abolish this system and restore American democracy to the hands of the voters. Otherwise, Democrats risk losing the White House AGAIN. [**If you agree that we need to abolish the Electoral College so we don 't have a repeat of 2016 and elect another Donald Trump, add your name to ours and demand that our presidential elections respect the will of the American people!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfce/6e9863e8/17c9a532/1db05d10/1785076253/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfce/6e9863e8/17c9a532/1db05d10/1785076253/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/wdtop/")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: This is an important week for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, This is an important week for our campaign. Just a few days from now, we're closing the books on the first mid-month fundraising deadline of 2020 -- and then, we're going to take a look at the budget. We filed a really great report last quarter, but our donations for January have slowed down. If I can count on you to make a contribution to our campaign today, then I know we'll have a fighting chance to get on track before our budget meeting. The last thing I want to do is start 2020 by finding places to scale back our budget, so I'm asking all of our supporters to step up today. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fd14/6cd27893/534f9aff/15860165/2176433607/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")

| | It's Civics 101: the person with the most votes wins. _Unless_ we're talking about elections for the most important job in the world, in which case the person with the most votes only wins _if_ they have the most votes in enough states that add up to a number that's more than the sum total of... Wait. Stop. _Enough._ **[Sign my petition: Abolish the Electoral College.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fd14/6cd27893/534f9aff/15860162/2176433607/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email-kicker")** If _every_ vote counted, Republican presidential candidates would come to blue states and Democratic candidates would show up in red states. Every candidate for president would compete for votes everywhere - in the entire country. That's the way it should be. **[Let's build a movement to get it done. Sign the petition.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fd14/6cd27893/534f9aff/15860162/2176433607/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email-kicker")** **_Jeff_** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fd14/6cd27893/534f9aff/15860162/2176433607/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email-kicker") |

body:

|

| [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489074d/7f51f7bc/4a8e0c8a/4ef01c3a/1680821327/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200115.2nd__758__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hey Peter,

My opponent, Senator John Cornyn, has no shortage of cash. He's had years to build a network of shady donors and cultivate relationships with corporate PACs and special interests. When you wonder why things are not working in Washington, I always say _follow the money_.

Our strategy is different. We're powered by grassroots donors, and we're fighting _**against**_ the influence of big money in politics. I want to take a moment before early voting in the primary starts (just over a month away!) -- to tell you why **[your contribution](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489074d/7f51f7bc/4a8e0c8a/4ef01c3a/1680821327/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200115.2nd__758__&amount=10&recurring=true")** at this point in the race is so essential. Here's what we're doing to win:
* We're planning digital and TV ads that spread this campaign's message far and wide
* We're hiring staff to build a dynamic campaign from the ground up
* I'm on the road every week to meet voters and hear their concerns

name: Wendy Davis
subject: On the impeachment of Donald Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
I want to know what your conscience is telling you
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk30-su-nd")
---
Friend,

Today, the House of Representatives voted to send the articles of impeachment to the Senate - where they'll debate whether to convict Donald Trump of high crimes and misdemeanors.
**Moments like these test our country's character: Will we stand up and do the right thing, even when it's hard? Or will we take the easy way out**? My opponent, Rep. Chip Roy, took the easy way out. He voted to protect a president who undermined our national security for personal and political gain - putting his party before his country.
**I don't want my grandbabies to grow up in a world where their leaders take the easy way out.** That's why, when I was first sworn into the Fort Worth City Council, I made a promise to myself that I would always vote my conscience - even when it means speaking truth to power.
**On this historic day for our nation, I want to know what your conscience is telling you. I'm hoping to hear from 3,200 supporters, including you, before midnight, so please respond now:**
| | **Should the Senate convict Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk30-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk30-su-nd")
---
Thank you for speaking out.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae3/704929dc/1610a3b9/39938f43/3331354758/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae3/704929dc/1610a3b9/39938f42/3331354758/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). [To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae3/704929dc/1610a3b9/39938f45/3331354758/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe") | Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
