name: Michael Bennet
subject: HUGE NEWS: Our campaign is surging!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but you should know why first.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Not too long ago, we announced our initiative to raise $700,000 to invest in New Hampshire by midnight tomorrow.

[I knew that hitting this goal would be a real challenge, but I had faith in this team, and friends - yesterday we had our best fundraising day of the quarter!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We're getting close to crossing the finish line but we're not there yet.

I won't mince words - we've always been a lean, scrappy campaign without the resources or the celebrity power of some of my fellow candidates.

[Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[My finance team told me this morning we are more than 88% of the way to hitting this goal. Can I count on you to make your first donation right now to help us close the gap?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [RUSH $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977308/4142652163/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [RUSH $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/6997730f/4142652163/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know this is a big goal to hit, team.

If we can hit this goal, it would allow us to keep our ads on the air and compete with the billionaires flooding this race with cash.

But failing to hit it would mean cutting our budget during the most critical phase of this campaign. It's as simple as that.

[Recent polls show that 67% of New Hampshire voters are still undecided - but we won't have the resources to reach out to them if we can't raise $84,584 by midnight tomorrow.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Chip in $5 (or whatever you can) right now, and let's get it done!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabc4/134673f2/81b23e0/69977374/4142652163/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Khadijah Naeem
subject: Where does Dan Crenshaw stand on healthcare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
You won’t believe what he’s up to now.
Peter,
One of the top goals of this campaign is the fight for accessible and affordable healthcare for everyone in our district.
**[Join our fight — pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford right now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13947414/145580804/1785235803?refcode=115_mm3&amount=10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDZiNTA1MS1mOTM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKH2woRAbHM9VwsmfdlkT0-X-qMq0CDzjwUiThsTq9Y=)**
While we have been knocking thousands of doors and spreading our healthcare message, Dan Crenshaw had other plans. At the end of 2019, Crenshaw voted against H.R. 3 — a law written to lower the cost of prescription drugs. **In 2018 — while campaigning for office — Crenshaw promised his voters that he would fight to lower prescription drug prices. Now that he’s got his power we see those promises were hollow.**
Crenshaw knows that Texans are suffering — even dying — from mounting drug prices. He doesn’t care. He would rather cater to his donors in big pharma.
Enough is enough. It’s time our district had a representative who fights for us. Not wealthy corporations and big pharma.

clean_body: You won’t believe what he’s up to now. Peter, One of the top goals of this campaign is the fight for accessible and affordable healthcare for everyone in our district. = While we have been knocking thousands of doors and spreading our healthcare message, Dan Crenshaw had other plans. At the end of 2019, Crenshaw voted against H.R. 3 — a law written to lower the cost of prescription drugs. In 2018 — while campaigning for office — Crenshaw promised his voters that he would fight to lower prescription drug prices. Now that he’s got his power we see those promises were hollow. Crenshaw knows that Texans are suffering — even dying — from mounting drug prices. He doesn’t care. He would rather cater to his donors in big pharma. Enough is enough. It’s time our district had a representative who fights for us. Not wealthy corporations and big pharma. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Every dollar donated is an investment in the fight for the future of our district. Friend, When Tom participated in his first presidential primary debate in October, the biggest existential threat of our lives was treated as an afterthought. How we handle the climate crisis will affect every other decision we make as a country, but none of the other candidates — or moderators — discussed it that way. Three months later, Tom is still the only candidate calling the climate crisis a number one priority. It’s going to take a concentrated effort to fight for climate and defeat Trump in November, but that’s just the start if we want to ensure a safe, healthy world for our children — [_**if you’re ready to pitch in and help, sign up today to volunteer.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVQJCYfD018owGI3n5YzGrSVkaGFt-2B2P2OeYWghMhDFKO6W2Z-2Fdq9-2BuqKU3I1ajDwMhQh190QDbcjbe8721AIB3lisCP3wM-2BB-2FCnYAlJ-2FyGagj-2FwbfnCwX630NYvXQwnZWKbW2Aakzmww9xo2qA-2Bg4imHzeL82OHw8GyglJ2gpqDLzEarBEZBDBLuCmylY3T04-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfItW70Qafol8QZsMKfYeA5iWs1QNxVWNm5dgq1g4LW5wmUQJgUWl48Tl-2FM76JRn-2FDqTkWyc8j45AmgK6Y6uY21Mp-2FJvk5rTXbLEjcn6ErsFYjyoy9zETaNob2S0Ub-2BklFzZIRk4Eohtp3Oy9VDm2-2FfHWszbRIQU-2Flr8fzeZAylAswiabWdG7WvHfbOq11TJo13TUFDtloAkhEHJFnA-2BXq551hd-2BlvXD2gZZUc4LX2AL9je0jFWx-2Bdr32tIhJ3The0Tx-2Bg-2Bs4eQv0OtaqZC-2BxWMnSIPv31BsOT-2BF814XDZJSgKu4IS9VhYuRkzqxlhbe13a-2BqK2dvjXywmpWHQGYYwCZb3DRlBuSI3q4gGCIR-2FvdiYtP-2BwKym37epiZp4khST0-3D) America is ready for meaningful action on climate. Let’s save the planet, and do it together.

clean_body: | | | | Friend, When Tom participated in his first presidential primary debate in October, the biggest existential threat of our lives was treated as an afterthought. How we handle the climate crisis will affect every other decision we make as a country, but none of the other candidates — or moderators — discussed it that way. Three months later, Tom is still the only candidate calling the climate crisis a number one priority. It’s going to take a concentrated effort to fight for climate and defeat Trump in November, but that’s just the start if we want to ensure a safe, healthy world for our children — America is ready for meaningful action on climate. It’s one of the main reasons Tom entered this race, and it’s the reason his message resonates with so many voters. We can’t sit idly by while Donald Trump leads this country down the path of climate destruction. We have an opportunity to protect our world before it’s too late — now is the time. Let’s save the planet, and do it together. | — Tom 2020 | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking = — we’ll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bba48f9ea3bf/they-did-it?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

The United States House of Representatives did it.

They really did it.

Minutes ago, Nancy Pelosi led the House in a vote to send the articles of impeachment to the United States Senate after a month of a **pathetic and failed attempt** at proving there was any crime committed by our President.

You’ve got to be kidding me.

Countless Americans are being killed by criminal illegal aliens. Our national security abroad is being tested. Innocent unborn children are being aborted in the womb by the thousands. **And all these do-nothing Democrats do is try to erase how you and I elected President Trump in 2016?**

The trial of President Trump in the Senate could begin as soon as next week.

Now is the time **you and I MUST hold every senator’s feet to the fire.**

Natural security victories ✔️
Border protection victories ✔️
Pro-life victories ✔️
Unemployment at record lows ✔️
The list goes on and on.

All because of the unwavering leadership of President Trump.

The ONLY way we continue the President's legacy is to gain back control of the United States House of Representatives.

You and I have been working in the grassroots for years to prevent the destructive ways of the Democrats from wreaking any more havoc on our country. **And now, we must fight harder than ever.**

President Trump needs fighters alongside him in Congress and not these professional buffoons currently controlling Congress.

Will you give a gift on this historic day of

|

With your generous support, I’ll make my way to the swamp to gain back control of the House and put an end to this nonsense.

Together, we will keep Texas red and preserve our conservative values.

For liberty,

Kathaleen Wall

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Washington is broken. Here's how we fix it:
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests
body:
Washington is clearly broken. Politicians are too responsive to their wealthy donors and corporate special interests...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80ed/2213987108/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Washington is clearly broken. Politicians are too responsive to wealthy donors and corporate special interests, promoting their agendas over the people they were elected to represent.
That's why Sara Gideon is introducing a set of reforms to end the influence of big money on our elections and officials. Want to learn more? Keep reading!
[**And when you 're done, add your name to say you endorse Sara's plan to end corporate influence in Washington. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80ec/2213987108/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/em-gideon-reform-agenda?source=em200115-1-c")
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80ec/2213987108/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/em-gideon-reform-agenda?source=em200115-1-c")
**1\. Overturn _Citizens United_**
The Supreme Court's decision on _Citizens United_ opened the door to a flood of unlimited spending by corporations and dark money groups in our elections. Establishing a basis for corporations to legally be considered people and allowing them to spend unlimited money in our elections has given them undue influence in Washington. We must overturn this decision as a first step towards restoring power to people, not corporations.
**2\. Crack down on secret spending in elections**
Once elected, Sara will work to pass the DISCLOSE Act - which Susan Collins cast the deciding vote against in the Senate - and the Real Time Transparency Act to increase accountability and crack down on secret special interest spending in elections.
**3\. Pass "No Budget No Pay" legislation**
Mainers know the importance of hard work and accountability. If a Maine lobsterman, or waitress, or logger, or teacher doesn't do their job -- they don't get paid. Our elected officials in Washington should be held to the same standard -- if they cannot pass a budget on time, they should not be paid.
**4\. No Corporate PAC money in this campaign**
Senator Collins has taken more than**$5.4 million** from corporate special interests throughout her career. And no surprise, she all too often put her donors' interests before Mainers'.
Sara Gideon isn't taking any money from corporate PACs in her campaign or as a U.S. Senator so that Maine people will never have to doubt whose interests she's representing in the Senate.
**5\. Ban former representatives from becoming lobbyists**
For too long, Washington has operated like a revolving door between the halls of the Capitol and K Street lobbying firms. No American should have to wonder whether their elected officials are thinking about their next job rather than their current one, which is why members of Congress should be banned from EVER becoming lobbyists -- not just for one or two years.
**6\. Refuse all gifts and meals from lobbyists**
Lawmakers and staff in Washington frequently skirt the rules to rub elbows with powerful lobbyists. No one should be evading ethics rules to attend lavish receptions held to sway elected officials.
**7\. Refuse special interest travel**
Lobbyists and special interests continue to take advantage of loopholes that allow them to pay for trips for members of Congress. Some of these trips are even paid for by special interests whose identities never have to be disclosed, making it harder to discern who is trying to influence members of Congress. In the Senate, Sara will refuse any trips paid for by special interests.
[**Are you on board with Sara 's plan to end the influence of big money in Washington? Add your name to endorse the plan today. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80e3/2213987108/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/em-gideon-reform-agenda?source=em200115-1-c")
Thanks for reading,
Team Sara
**********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80ec/2213987108/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/em-gideon-reform-agenda?source=em200115-1-c")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80e2/2213987108/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80e1/2213987108/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e8f/4bef7a87/6ac562f6/287f80e0/2213987108/VEsO/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Nikki's iPhone
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Congress
body:
---
| | I never shy away from hard work. I worked my way into the Air Force, made my way up to a combat pilot and flew many missions to protect our country. And now I'm running for Congress to serve my country again. And as a woman of color, I've had to work extra hard to earn my place. When I was a kid, there were hardly any women who looked like me running for Congress. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **I never shy away from hard work.** I worked my way into the Air Force, made my way up to a combat pilot and flew many missions to protect our country. And now I'm running for Congress to serve my country again. And as a woman of color, I've had to work extra hard to earn my place. **When I was a kid, there were hardly any women who looked like me running for Congress.** **2018 inspired me so much** \-- seeing America elect the most diverse Congress in our nation's history made me realize now is the time to break down barriers and shatter glass ceilings. We made history in 2018, and we can make history again in 2020 -- **[that's why I'm asking you to chip in to my Democratic campaign for Congress to help us hit our mid-month goal and win this race >>](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200115_MM5_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+to+chi&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200115_MM5_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200115_MM5_U1_X1")** Together, we can make the world a better and more inclusive place for future generations. Nikki

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last night's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
They're realizing climate is tied to *everything.*
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8405?t=3&akid=8021%2E868730%2EWpv4S9) Friend, _"We're gonna get to climate change but I want to stay on trade."_ That was the response from Democratic presidential debate moderators last night when Bernie Sanders tried to tie climate to trade -- and insist they are one and the same. (Because, well, they are.) And that's how it was all night -- candidates pushing for more debate about climate, while moderators waited until the final half hour of the debate to briefly focus on unquestionably the most important issue of our lifetime. It's because candidates are listening: Last night, Senator Warren, Senator Sanders, Mayor Buttigieg, and Tom Steyer all brought up climate in their answers to questions about trade and national security because they know climate affects every issue and every living thing on this planet. **So while the media, the same channels that rely on huge advertising buys from Big Oil, continue to ignore the climate crisis, our Democratic candidates are stepping up. Last night's debate was proof our push for a bigger focus on climate is working, and we can't let up before the Iowa caucuses next month:** [**Share the news about candidates' climate-focused answers on Facebook right now, and keep up the drumbeat for the primaries next month!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8405?t=4&akid=8021%2E868730%2EWpv4S9) Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE NOW!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8405?t=5&akid=8021%2E868730%2EWpv4S9)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

body:

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We can't risk Trump winning again -- TOO much is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72% \-- three states he's campaigning heavily in ahead of this year's election. If Democrats fail to show up to vote again, Trump will win, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, and calling white supremacists "very fine people." That will all look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. Right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $714 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy right as the 2020 election season is heating up. Peter, we do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. [**If you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we 're asking you to please donate $25 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. Can you give just $25 now?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdff0/6e9863e8/17cbe41b/1db05c00/1997792134/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200115c&refcode2=iLBz3J3BqN8nPGPsMaa1") Your help is critical to pushing back and winning in November. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdff0/6e9863e8/17cbe41b/1db05c00/1997792134/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200115c&refcode2=iLBz3J3BqN8nPGPsMaa1")

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Helping from afar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
We’ve been real, real
busy in Texas lately, and I wanted to catch you up on the work we’re
doing.

This past weekend, we held our first weekend of action for Eliz Markowitz.
She’s an incredible candidate running in a special election runoff for
Texas House District 28.

More than 400 people signed up to volunteer for over 750 canvassing
shifts, and we ended up knocking on more than 12,000 doors. It was an
incredible experience, and we could tip the scales if we keep the momentum
going. But we can’t do it alone:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42091?refcode=ema20200115-77228&t=1019&akid=77228%2E444211%2EwjFh2K ]Can you donate $3 and help ensure we have the resources needed for our
next Weekend of Action? We have a lot more work to do here in Fort Bend —
and even MORE work flipping the rest of Texas. Your support is crucial.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42091?refcode=ema20200115-77228&t=1020&akid=77228%2E444211%2EwjFh2K ]Donate $3

Special elections like this one are often decided by a few thousand votes
or less. And to reiterate — we just knocked on 12,000 doors. What that
says is that our grassroots organizing can make all the difference in this
race.

But grassroots organizing isn’t enough all on its own. Running a statewide
voter-contact program to flip Texas blue requires a lot of staff,
volunteers, and resources. So even if you’re not able to pitch in in
person, please know that your support from afar — in whatever way possible
— is absolutely invaluable to us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42091?refcode=ema20200115-77228&t=1021&akid=77228%2E444211%2EwjFh2K ]If you can, please make a $3 donation to Powered By People today, and
help us not only elect Eliz Markowitz in HD-28, but win big in the rest of
Texas.

This is a critical moment. We only need to win 8 more seats in order to
flip the Texas Legislature blue for the first time since 2001. It’s only
possible if we continue to work together.

Gratefully,

The Powered By People Team

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42091?refcode=ema20200115-77228&t=1022&akid=77228%2E444211%2EwjFh2K ]Donate $3

P.S. Here’s some photos from our most recent Weekend of Action!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=77228%2E444211%2EwjFh2K

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Celebrating MLK
body:
https://www.facebook.com/marcfloresforcongress/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927
Good afternoon Peter,

Today is Martin Luther King Jr.'s birthday. Between now and Monday (MLK Day), I want to share a bit of our mission on the campaign trail, and how Reverend Doctor King inspires me.

As we have been traveling throughout the district, our main objective has been to hear from people who feel as though they are not heard or represented in Washington, and asking them what changes they are hoping for.

Facing Disparity
One common issue we have heard about is the marginal disparity faced by those in poverty. Be it because of their race or their ethnicity, be it their location of residence or level of education, many of our neighbors feel abandoned by their leaders, and have given up hope.

I plan to change this. Since the beginning, our campaign has been based around working with local leaders, and meeting clubs and organizations in Houston, to ensure that we hear issues directly from the people.
Help us Succeed
We need your help, if we are to succeed in connecting as many voters as possible, and hearing how we can make a difference.

If you
donate $20 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927) , we can send out 80 mailers to voters we haven't yet reached. Your donation also gives us more time to block walk and talk to voters, because we don't have to spend as much time fundraising.
$20 = 80 Mailers (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)
That being said, if you aren't able to donate today, please sign up to block walk with us. Our goal is to reach every voter in the district, and we can only do that with your help. Sign up (https://www.mobilize.us/dashboard/marcfloresforcongress/event/197211/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927) for a block walk today, and help us reach our goal!
Block Walk This Saturday (https://www.mobilize.us/dashboard/marcfloresforcongress/event/197211/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)
Join me in our coalition to end senseless ignorance and intolerance, and share our message of inclusion, equality, and progress.

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8759c3ac0b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8759c3ac0b-32267927)

Thank you for your support,

Marc

This is a pivotal time in our country's history.

The rich and powerful are rigging the rules to make themselves richer and more powerful. Donald Trump is systematically undermining our institutions and our democracy. Our planet is in peril, and we're running out of time to tackle climate change.

There is a lot at stake, and people are scared. Last night at the debate, Elizabeth made it clear: **2020 is our chance. Our chance to unite against Donald Trump.**

And Elizabeth is building the grassroots movement that can -- and will -- lead that fight and deliver big, structural change in 2021.

She's running an inclusive, hopeful, courageous, and 100% grassroots-powered campaign. Together, we're fighting to win this election and make America work for working families -- not for corporations and the rich and powerful.

**Democrats will win in 2020 when we nominate a candidate who unites people across the country and who isn't afraid to fight for big, structural changes that will make things better.**

name: Important Report -- via Team Wilmot
subject: the difference is clear

name: Ted Budd for Congress
subject: Invitation: Will you come on Saturday?
body:
Friends,

It has been a busy month of August recess in the district and I am excited to get back to promoting conservative ideas in Washington. As I head back, I am proud to announce I was chosen as FreedomWorks' Member of the Month for September 2017.

Here's what they said:

"Rep. Budd was a strong proponent of repealing and replacing ObamaCare. In a press release, he said, “If history is any guide I’ll take around 2,000 votes this Congress. Most of them will be forgotten. This is not one of those votes. This vote marks the beginning of the end of Obamacare as we know it. The failure of that law can be seen in the double-digit premium increases and monopoly situation in the individual insurance market in our state.” Rep. Budd maintained a principled stance on the issue and understands the disaster that ObamaCare is for the American people.

FreedomWorks’ looks forward to working with Rep. Budd to fight for conservative principles. The August recess is coming to an end. With several congressional deadlines coming up in September, including passing a budget and and beginning work on fundamental tax reform, FreedomWorks’ anticipates the push back from the left and moderate republicans on the issues this fall, but are thankful for members like Rep. Budd who have worked hard to keep the promises on which they were elected." Read more HERE (click link insert).

I am working hard to be your voice in Washington. Thank you for your continued prayers.

Best,

Ted

You're receiving this newsletter because you have shown interest in Congressman Ted Budd.
Not interested anymore? Click here to unsubscribe:

| Team - Michael just went on MSNBC and _SHREDDED_ Trump's economic lies with THE TRUTH.

[We could have used Michael's voice on the debate stage last night. No other candidates made this strong of an argument against Trump. That's what we will need to beat him in November.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabfb/134673f2/81d87f4/699776c8/853733387/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael called out Trump's outrageous jobs gap. If Trump was creating jobs at the same rate Obama did, we'd have one million more jobs in the United States than we do today.

A veteran Democratic strategist called Michael's argument a clear distillation of how Trump's economy is failing people who work for a living.

[It's clear that Michael is the one candidate in this race who comes from the right kind of state with the right kind of agenda to take on Trump. If he is our nominee, there's no way we lose an economic argument like we did last time.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabfb/134673f2/81d87f4/699776c8/853733387/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

He's the only candidate in this race to have won two tough elections in a purple swing state. As other candidates spew more empty promises, Michael's held 33 town halls in New Hampshire in the last five weeks to answer every single question and tell the truth.

[We're in the final stretch until the first votes are cast, and we're 88% of the way to reaching our $700,000 New Hampshire Investment goal!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabfb/134673f2/81d87f4/699776c8/853733387/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana, many defense resources

Friend,

Last night during his State of the State Address, Governor Holcomb set a goal of TRIPLING federal defense investment in our state.

This is a tall order in a state with an already robust defense industry and key national defense resources Crane, Muscatatuck, and Atterbury. But Governor Holcomb is committed to taking the industry to the Next Level.

No state is better positioned to develop the future of defense technologies like radar, sonar, hypersonics, and drones than Indiana.

This week, Eric wanted to share how Indiana is already making a positive impact on our country’s armed forces. Take a look at some of Indiana’s biggest contributions below:
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0e88c3fa927440f89634cd6fce3dd553&_e=yxvsRIJtFnyMEhe2mHU8ZVHJax33H1hJSF5Y3-PTki8DhRUr-CcW38mQ27k9vury3UGCcxTF88MxfqM8rWR6Km_tfUj5doD3qYolAYfkFPAcoXv1isiKYgZ_XAzwlr6pJ2OzA1uXx1pT9vWnzaybAUNA8NwjGNW7cvLXijAJ5Od1orGq2TZhfYnlbSqNqJq_LfSwrfgORXGMs9f4UkjPCxHqdekQHL2zhStaUty5iqPRZP3EmcvrCkpsXmEzU-RIl-afsbM9YZ0gr7bFj1NNZFs10UcTQdv9gSpgp-tuP_vMCewvo6-mVDUep8E3OHDQNImOUA-C0uhpzd5RFUFeQ1-8BQYKepKgwD3JJ21RcG0Ns492VNaCcCWMbzSTAw7i22435IKLVcZECFb_2jC-FDfY2hg8657nReoy7DKZcja7Gncr6UbxVhzFF34L5mLJ)

* The Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane Division (Martin County) is the **third-largest naval base in the world.**
* Terre Haute 181st Intel Wing (Vigo County) **controls drones in the Middle East.**
* Muscatatuck Urban Training Center (Jennings County) is the **largest counter-terrorism training site in the United States.**
* Grissom Aeroplex (Miami & Cass Counties) has **a runway measuring 12.501 by 200 feet, making it one of the longest in the United States.**
* Indiana National Guard currently has the **3rd largest National Guard troop level. **
* Grissom Air Reserve Base (Cass & Miami Counties) is **home to the 434th Air Refueling Wing, the largest KC-135 unit in the Air Force Reserve. **
* By 2024, **all military pensions will be exempt from Indiana state income tax.**
* This spring, Indiana will open the **first facility in the country that brings together everything our veterans need—VA, courts, veterans organization and more—all under one roof! **

_For 203 years now, Indiana has contributed greatly to our national defense and, under Governor Holcomb, we’ll continue to do so in the years ahead._
**Flash poll**
**Q: Did you know that the third-largest naval base in the world was in Indiana?**
[ **Yes** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0e88c3fa927440f89634cd6fce3dd553&_e=yxvsRIJtFnyMEhe2mHU8ZVHJax33H1hJSF5Y3-PTki8DhRUr-CcW38mQ27k9vury3UGCcxTF88MxfqM8rWR6Km_tfUj5doD3qYolAYfkFPAcoXv1isiKYgZ_XAzwlr6pJ2OzA1uXx1pT9vWnzaybAUNA8NwjGNW7cvLXijAJ5Od1orGq2TZhfYnlbSqNqJq_LfSwrfgORXGMs9f4UkjPCxHqdekQHL2zhStaUty5iqNTMUvqdOzHJdR14Sv4a4pXYAULvNaoW0YwD5Egre_opBaTPtdpb-28SsbcmuSlgiNT1W9r1XFrZxzSp4lG47yNqHytXIQNabGpheKijIbCGvQf-fAgepcwqbHSXQs5nS5NquXEjvO4O0ZNtKksGc64GiisMMHXM-51qrDgd2rgls84PvGh37aEMwk_3P5AHG96FV4V4FCbbcC4piEuaWBD)
[ **No** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0e88c3fa927440f89634cd6fce3dd553&_e=yxvsRIJtFnyMEhe2mHU8ZVHJax33H1hJSF5Y3-PTki8DhRUr-CcW38mQ27k9vury3UGCcxTF88MxfqM8rWR6Km_tfUj5doD3qYolAYfkFPBFpFrBBd34dA6h5pJqaDuELI6V4TISIBjbxwvtbPKiR9ZmBjGFZjFE7meb8xzRlUCoK2PucdI9Dk_9YxQG1sUuoVfpO3drYyBNPGTGv8WYDKycWvoLGkgOkDbDxCYbob7uc9pRJbvpFuFVkFS7zDp6l7RRi4MG-xb2ci0hhaTBZCJjzMcPZEYcAQ4ohwJREzoR2XCq4RiR4Vk7mgs8svCJo4sWTCLeKY82t7MkswlDPeiDLA4-67-1xkV5SyKwn3nYIWoiXyjHa3cfETHYrlTe_nGDHnBQd8sagh3Oad88q3OAvFPb4JA3DJ8rXh-2FZ0uaD5AQD_WJwJqFXTNDn40)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: PROMISE KEPT: President Trump signs landmark phase 1 deal with China
body:
In a historic moment, President Donald J. Trump was joined today by the Vice Premier of China in the East Room of the White House. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5839d4017&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **PROMISE KEPT: President Trump signs landmark phase 1 deal with China**

**In a historic moment,** President Donald J. Trump was joined today by the Vice Premier of China in the East Room of the White House. Together, they signed a new, fully enforceable trade agreement that rebalances this vital trade partnership while boosting American businesses, farmers, manufacturers, and innovators.

**“From day one** , my Administration has fought tirelessly to achieve a level playing field for the American worker,” President Trump said. Before he took office, Washington had long tolerated unfair trade practices that buoyed special interests while hurting U.S. working- and middle-class families.

**President Trump:**[I’m putting the American people first!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe9231cdc6&e=3ee4985eea)

**“For years, politicians** ran for office promising action to remedy these practices, only to do nothing but allow them to continue,” the President said this morning. “Unlike those who came before me, I kept my promise . . . Now, our efforts have yielded a transformative deal that will bring tremendous benefits to both countries.”

**The new agreement** makes good on a number of key promises to fix trade with China:
* _American-made products_ : To help rebalance the relationship, China has pledged to increase imports of American goods and services by at least $200 billion.

* _Agriculture purchases_ : As part of that commitment, China will be stocking up on goods from U.S. farmers—between $40 and $50 billion worth.

* _No more forced technology transfers_ : For the first time ever, China agreed to end its practice of forcing American companies to transfer their technology to Chinese companies as a condition for doing business there.

* _Fair currency practices_ : Beijing has agreed to stronger commitments on its practices regarding currency devaluations and exchange rates.

**And that’s just phase one.** The work on a phase-two deal is already underway.

**“With this signing,** we mark more than just an agreement. We mark a sea change in international trade. At long last, Americans have a government that puts them first at the negotiating table,” President Trump said.

**A stronger America** , of course, doesn’t come at the rest of the globe’s expense. On the contrary, when the United States is thriving, it makes the world a safer, more stable place. A better and fairer trade partnership with China will do much of the same.

**Starting today** , a new era of harmony, prosperity, and commerce officially begins.

**🎬** [Iowa Gov. Kim Reynolds explains what this deal means for rural America](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd2d2d6e5f&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump:** [China will be buying A LOT of these American goods](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d1676b658&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---

| **President Donald J. Trump, joined by Chinese Vice Premier Liu He, sign the U.S. China Phase One Trade Agreement** | January 15, 2020
---
